'''鈭歵h-n-ch''' ('''kathanach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yakk|yakk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yakk|yakk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-n-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kathanach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithanach|thithanach]] || [[word:jithanach|jithanach]] || [[word:shithanach|shithanach]] || [[word:kithanach|kithanach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthanach|thuthuthanach]] || [[word:jujuthanach|jujuthanach]] || [[word:shushuthanach|shushuthanach]] || [[word:kukuthanach|kukuthanach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthanach|thuthanach]] || [[word:juthanach|juthanach]] || [[word:shuthanach|shuthanach]] || [[word:kuthanach|kuthanach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthanach|thuthanach]] || [[word:juthanach|juthanach]] || [[word:shuthanach|shuthanach]] || [[word:kuthanach|kuthanach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethanach|thethanach]] || [[word:jethanach|jethanach]] || [[word:shethanach|shethanach]] || [[word:kethanach|kethanach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothanach|thothothanach]] || [[word:jojothanach|jojothanach]] || [[word:shoshothanach|shoshothanach]] || [[word:kokothanach|kokothanach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothanach|thothanach]] || [[word:jothanach|jothanach]] || [[word:shothanach|shothanach]] || [[word:kothanach|kothanach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothanach|thothanach]] || [[word:jothanach|jothanach]] || [[word:shothanach|shothanach]] || [[word:kothanach|kothanach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thanach|th忙thanach]] || [[word:j忙thanach|j忙thanach]] || [[word:sh忙thanach|sh忙thanach]] || [[word:k忙thanach|k忙thanach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathanach|thathathanach]] || [[word:jajathanach|jajathanach]] || [[word:shashathanach|shashathanach]] || [[word:kakathanach|kakathanach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathanach|thathanach]] || [[word:jathanach|jathanach]] || [[word:shathanach|shathanach]] || [[word:kathanach|kathanach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathanach|thathanach]] || [[word:jathanach|jathanach]] || [[word:shathanach|shathanach]] || [[word:kathanach|kathanach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathanach|shathanach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathanach|goshathanach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathanach|gokishathanach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathanachn眉|shathanachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathanachnkn眉|goshathanachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathanachn眉|gokishathanachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathanachsh毛|shathanachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathanachnksh毛|goshathanachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathanachsh毛|gokishathanachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathanachro|shathanachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathanachnkro|goshathanachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathanachro|gokishathanachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathanachmu|shathanachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathanachnkmu|goshathanachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathanachmu|gokishathanachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathanachsher|shathanachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathanachnksher|goshathanachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathanachsher|gokishathanachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathanachng|shathanachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathanachnkng|goshathanachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathanachng|gokishathanachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathanachya|shathanachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathanachnkya|goshathanachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathanachya|gokishathanachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathanachyam|shathanachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathanachnkyam|goshathanachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathanachyam|gokishathanachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathanachn眉sh毛|shathanachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathanachnkn眉sh毛|goshathanachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathanachn眉sh毛|gokishathanachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathanachn眉ro|shathanachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathanachnkn眉ro|goshathanachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathanachn眉ro|gokishathanachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathanachn眉mu|shathanachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathanachnkn眉mu|goshathanachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathanachn眉mu|gokishathanachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathanachsh毛n眉|shathanachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathanachnksh毛n眉|goshathanachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathanachsh毛n眉|gokishathanachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathanachsh毛ro|shathanachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathanachnksh毛ro|goshathanachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathanachsh毛ro|gokishathanachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathanachsh毛mu|shathanachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathanachnksh毛mu|goshathanachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathanachsh毛mu|gokishathanachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathanachron眉|shathanachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathanachnkron眉|goshathanachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathanachron眉|gokishathanachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathanachrosh毛|shathanachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathanachnkrosh毛|goshathanachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathanachrosh毛|gokishathanachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathanachromu|shathanachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathanachnkromu|goshathanachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathanachromu|gokishathanachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathanachmun眉|shathanachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathanachnkmun眉|goshathanachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathanachmun眉|gokishathanachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathanachmush毛|shathanachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathanachnkmush毛|goshathanachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathanachmush毛|gokishathanachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathanachmuro|shathanachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathanachnkmuro|goshathanachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathanachmuro|gokishathanachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
